data.content:
Implementation complete on commit 3f971f86.

CHANGES:
- src/lib/agent-identity.ts: rewrote per-provider extractors (Claude/Codex/Gemini/Copilot/OpenCode) to emit display-form. Removed MODEL_LABELS, formatModelDisplay, formatFlavorDisplay. Simplified formatAgentFamily to single-line filter+join with one uniform 'drop redundant fields vs provider' rule.
- src/lib/agent-identity-opencode-format.ts (new): parseOpenCodePath with small vocabulary table for known compound vendors (openrouter, moonshotai, anthropic, z-ai, mistral, google, copilot, opencode, openai, meta, qwen, deepseek, xai, perplexity, cohere); auto-uppercase trailing AI/ML/IO/JS suffix; version-split rule.
- src/lib/agent-identity-canonical.ts: parsed value wins over caller-supplied lease_model/flavor/version (foolery-b42b migration story).
- Tests: agent-identity*.test.ts, knots-canonical-metadata.test.ts, knots-lease-roundtrip.test.ts, settings-load*.test.ts, settings-scan.test.ts updated lock-step. Added agent-identity-opencode-format.test.ts (16 cases covering vocab, suffix-upper, version-split, path parsing).
- Migration: legacy machine-form lease_model='opus/claude' / flavor='opus' on disk get rewritten to 'Opus/Claude' / 'Opus' on first read (idempotent). Test added: 'rewrites lease_model and flavor to display-form'.
- docs/knots-agent-identity-contract.md: new 'Single canonical form' section + new self-audit grep on MODEL_LABELS[.
- src/stories/beat-status-badge.stories.tsx: fixed pre-existing dangling import (unrelated cleanup; was failing test:all on main).

ACs covered:
- AC-1, AC-2: engineering substantiated by tests; visual confirmation pending user (AC-9).
- AC-3: MODEL_LABELS and formatModelDisplay removed entirely. Self-audit grep returns zero.
- AC-4: per-provider extractor tests assert display-form output ('GPT', 'Claude', 'Opus', 'Pro').
- AC-5: formatAgentFamily is a single filter+join. Codex special-case removed.
- AC-6: parseOpenCodePath covers all listed segment cases (kimi-k2.6, glm-5.1, claude-sonnet-4-5, devstral-2512, gemini-2.5-pro).
- AC-7: settings migration wired through normalizeRegisteredAgentConfig; idempotent; preserves approvalMode.
- AC-8: lint, tsc, test (3153/3153), test:all (3193/3193), build all green.
- AC-10: contract doc updated.

OpenCode display proof: openrouter/moonshotai/kimi-k2.6 -> normalizeAgentIdentity yields {provider:'OpenCode', model:'OpenRouter MoonshotAI Kimi-k', version:'2.6', flavor:undefined}. parseAgentDisplayParts label = 'OpenCode OpenRouter MoonshotAI Kimi-k 2.6' with router pill 'openrouter'.

AC-9 (visual verification) explicitly LEFT OPEN — pending user eyeball on running app.
